programs.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 Preview Series
programs.desc: As the FIFA World Cup 2026 fast approaches, this preview series looks at all the nations that will be competing across the United States, Canada and Mexico with the goal of lifting the World Cup.

programs.title: The Hotel Inspector
programs.desc: Alex Polizzi returns to the Kent coast, revisiting the Westward Ho!, where five years ago she came to the rescue of hotelier Jon. She investigates whether he has turned the tide for his seaside hotel.

programs.title: Rich Holiday Poor Holiday
programs.desc: Wealthy friends Lyn and Hugh spend a week in Kent in a static caravan, while office workers Keisha and Merrit stay in Chamonix at a luxury wellness chalet in the shadow of Mont Blanc.

programs.title: Te Karere
programs.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programs.title: TVNZ1 Quiz
programs.desc: TVNZ 1 is a major New Zealand free-to-air television channel operated by the state-owned Television New Zealand. It broadcasts a broad mix of programming, primarily focusing on news, current affairs, drama, entertainment, and factual shows.
